description: L1 structured filter pruning — entire Conv2d output filters removed
pruning_criterion: L1 norm of filter (sum of |w| per output filter)

notes.structured_sparsity: Fraction of zero-norm filters in Conv2d layers
notes.weight_sparsity: Fraction of zero weight values (all weights in zero filters)
notes.real_speedup: Structured pruning CAN yield real speedup after model rebuild — zero-row Conv ops are skipped by cuDNN. PyTorch's prune API zeroes rows but keeps tensor shapes; rebuild for actual FLOP reduction.
notes.size_note: Disk size compresses well due to zero-filter rows
notes.flops_active: FLOPs * density — theoretical sparse compute savings
